_publications._publicationTitle: The scaffold protein KSR1, a novel therapeutic target for the treatment of Merlin-deficient tumors.

_contextSnippet: Co-IP data confirmed that indeed, KSR1 forms a complex with Merlin regardless of its Serine 518 phosphorylation status
details: Confirmed direct interaction between overexpressed KSR1 and Merlin regardless of Merlin's Serine 518 phosphorylation status through co-immunoprecipitation
